name: The Alaire at Twinbrook Station
bathroomsNote: 2BR units have 2 baths (1,022-1,175 sq ft). 1BR+den also available.

notes.doormanDetail: Concierge listed as amenity; confirmed office/concierge hours Mon-Fri 9am-6pm, Sat 10am-5pm. No source confirms 24-hour lobby staffing. Building has controlled-access entry. 24-hour emergency maintenance is separate from front-desk staffing.
notes.packageDetail: Package receiving confirmed as listed amenity
notes.climateDetail: Central air conditioning listed as a unit feature; described as in-unit climate control. No indication of building-controlled HVAC or shared systems.
notes.petDetail: Cats and dogs welcome, up to 2 pets each. Breed restrictions apply for dogs.
notes.balconyDetail: Full-sized patios and Juliet balconies both available depending on unit and floor.
notes.wellMaintainedDetail: Mixed resident feedback. Some long-term residents (10+ years) praise clean amenities and responsive staff. Others cite maintenance request delays, management responsiveness issues, and safety concerns in common areas. Green-certified building with modern construction. 'Unclear' is the honest read.
notes.floorPlanDetail: 1BR, 1BR+den, 2BR, and two-story loft configurations available. 2BR units range 1,022-1,175 sq ft.
notes.transitAccess: Steps from Twinbrook Metro Station (Red Line)
notes.gymDetail: K!CK fitness center with cardio theater, treadmills, eSpinner, Nautilus, Smith machine, free weights
notes.poolDetail: Eco-friendly saline swimming pool with water feature
